# CVGetHostClockMinimumTimeDelta()

**Function**

Returns the smallest possible increment in the system time.

## Declaration

```swift
func CVGetHostClockMinimumTimeDelta() -> UInt32
```

## Return Value

The smallest valid increment in the system time.

## Inspecting the Host Clock

- **CVGetCurrentHostTime()**: Returns the current system time.
- **CVGetHostClockFrequency()**: Returns the frequency of updates to the system time.

items.description: Returns the frequency of updates to the system time.
